name: Piri Piri Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the peppers by removing their stems and coarsely chopping them, including the seeds.
2. Place the chopped peppers, 1 tablespoon of coarse salt, olive oil, and cider vinegar in a 1 pint jar with a tight-fitting lid.
3. Seal the jar and shake well to combine all ingredients.
4. Refrigerate the mixture until ready to use.
